title: Link-Bearing Elements, Relations, Base URLs, and Crawl Graph · Runtime Contract: Reference Classification
summary: Only anchor tags are inspected, every href becomes a page, relation and base semantics disappear, and fetched URL sets stand in for a graph. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go reference classification increment in semantic provenance-rich link graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case prac…
objectives: Reject or classify fragment, empty, malformed, mailto, tel, javascript, data, credentials, and unsupported schemes before scheduling.
Interpret rel tokens, canonical, alternate, hreflang, download, media, nofollow, and target under explicit owner policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
